author: gb9t
content:
Phase C /loop iter 11: 2 Tier-3 docs (block layer pivot).

block/blk-mq.md (203 lines, 13 REQ / 12 AC, 0 open) — multi-queue request layer: per-CPU ctx → per-hardware-queue hctx mapping + per-hctx tag bitmap + request lifecycle state machine + I/O scheduler integration + timeout handling + DMA-mapping. struct request + struct blk_mq_hw_ctx layout-equivalence. Mandatory L2 TLA+ models for tag-allocation and request-state-machine. Mandatory L3 invariants for tag bitmap exclusivity + request list non-duplication.

block/bio.md (218 lines, 14 REQ / 13 AC, 0 open) — block I/O request: struct bio + struct bio_vec + bvec_iter cursor + bio chaining (parent/children with refcount) + split/merge + user-buffer mapping (GUP-based) + helpers (discard/zeroout/secure_erase/flush/zone_*). REQ_OP_*/REQ_* numeric byte-identity. Mandatory L3 chain-acyclicity invariant.

Total .design/ docs: 61.
